subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Those souls who counted themselves among the people of truth and deemed themselves discoverers of mysteries and secrets found themselves in a quandary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت نفوسی که خویش را از اهل حقیقت میشمردند و کاشف راز و اسرار میدانستند در عقبه
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
